title: helianthemum lavandulifolium var. thibaudii
intro: Helianthemum lavandulifolium var. thibaudii, also known as rockrose, is a type of flowering plant in the Cistaceae family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been traditionally used to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of rockrose include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and promoting wound healing. Rockrose can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and salves, and is often used in herbal medicine to support overall health and well-being.
